steps.t: The broken sword is upon a stone cairn in the ruins of Dol Ringwest which lie west of Duillond. Bregar has asked you to search the ruins of Dol Ringwe…
Bregar awaits your return in Duillond, east of the ruins of Dol Ringwest. You recovered a broken sword from a burial cairn in the Elf-ruins of Dol Rin…
